members.member:
Agent ID uniquely identifies an agent instance within an agent runtime, including a distributed runtime. It serves as the "address" of the agent instance for receiving messages. \
See the Python equivalent: AgentId in AutoGen (Python).

member.name: F:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.AgentId.DefaultKey
member.summary: The default source value used when no source is explicitly provided.

member.name: P:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.AgentId.Type
member.summary: An identifier that associates an agent with a specific factory function. Strings may only be composed of alphanumeric letters (a-z) and (0-9), or underscores (_).

member.name: P:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.AgentId.Key
member.summary: Agent instance identifier. Strings may only be composed of alphanumeric letters (a-z) and (0-9), or underscores (_).

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.AgentId.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct.
member.param: The agent type.
Agent instance identifier.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.AgentId.#ctor(System.ValueTuple{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct from a tuple.
member.param: A tuple containing the agent type and key.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.AgentId.#ctor(Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.AgentType,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct from an .
member.param: The agent type.
Agent instance identifier.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.AgentId.FromStr(System.String)
member.summary: Convert a string of the format "type/key" into an .
member.param: The agent ID string.
member.returns: An instance of .

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.AgentId.ToString
member.summary: Returns the string representation of the .
member.returns: A string in the format "type/key".

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.AgentId.Equals(System.Object)
member.summary: Determines whether the specified object is equal to the current .
member.param: The object to compare with the current instance.
member.returns: true if the specified object is equal to the current ; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.AgentId.GetHashCode
member.summary: Returns a hash code for this .
member.returns: A hash code for the current instance.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.AgentId.op_Explicit(System.String)~Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.AgentId
member.summary: Explicitly converts a string to an .
member.param: The string representation of an agent ID.
member.returns: An instance of .

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.AgentId.op_Equality(Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.AgentId,Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.AgentId)
member.summary: Equality operator for .

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.AgentId.op_Inequality(Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.AgentId,Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.AgentId)
member.summary: Inequality operator for .

member.name: T:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.AgentMetadata
member.summary: Represents metadata associated with an agent, including its type, unique key, and description.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.AgentMetadata.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Represents metadata associated with an agent, including its type, unique key, and description.

member.name: P:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.AgentMetadata.Type
member.summary: An identifier that associates an agent with a specific factory function. Strings may only be composed of alphanumeric letters (a-z, 0-9), or underscores (_).

member.name: P:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.AgentMetadata.Key
member.summary: A unique key identifying the agent instance. Strings may only be composed of alphanumeric letters (a-z, 0-9), or underscores (_).

member.name: P:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.AgentMetadata.Description
member.summary: A brief description of the agent's purpose or functionality.

member.name: T:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.AgentProxy
member.summary: A proxy that allows you to use an in place of its associated .

member.name: F:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.AgentProxy._runtime
member.summary: The runtime instance used to interact with agents.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.AgentProxy.#ctor(Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.AgentId,Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.IAgentRuntime)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.AgentProxy.Id
member.summary: The target agent for this proxy.

member.name: P:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.AgentProxy.Metadata
member.summary: Gets the metadata of the agent.
member.value: An instance of containing details about the agent.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.AgentProxy.SendMessageAsync(System.Object,Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.AgentId,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a message to the agent and processes the response.
member.param: The message to send to the agent.
The agent that is sending the message.
The message ID. If null, a new message ID will be generated. This message ID must be unique and is recommended to be a UUID.
A token used to cancel an in-progress operation. Defaults to null.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation, returning the response from the agent.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.AgentProxy.LoadStateAsync(System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary: Loads the state of the agent from a previously saved state.
member.param: A dictionary representing the state of the agent. Must be JSON serializable.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.AgentProxy.SaveStateAsync
member.summary: Saves the state of the agent. The result must be JSON serializable.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation, returning a dictionary containing the saved state.

member.name: T:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.AgentType
member.summary: Represents the type of an agent as a string. This is a strongly-typed wrapper around a string, ensuring type safety when working with agent types.
member.remarks: This struct is immutable and provides implicit conversion to and from .

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.AgentType.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct.
member.param: The agent type.

member.name: P:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.AgentType.Name
member.summary: The string representation of this agent type.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.AgentType.ToString
member.summary: Returns the string representation of the .
member.returns: A string in the format "type/source".

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.AgentType.op_Explicit(System.Type)~Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.AgentType
member.summary: Explicitly converts a to an .
member.param: The .NET to convert.
member.returns: An instance with the name of the provided type.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.AgentType.op_Implicit(System.String)~Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.AgentType
member.summary: Implicitly converts a to an .
member.param: The string representation of the agent type.
member.returns: An instance with the given name.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.AgentType.op_Implicit(Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.AgentType)~System.String
member.summary: Implicitly converts an to a .
member.param: The instance.
member.returns: The string representation of the agent type.

member.name: T:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.CantHandleException
member.summary: Exception thrown when a handler cannot process the given message.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.CantHandleException.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.CantHandleException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a custom error message.
member.param: The custom error message.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.CantHandleException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a custom error message and an inner exception.
member.param: The custom error message.
The inner exception that caused this error.

member.name: T:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.MessageDroppedException
member.summary: Exception thrown when a message is dropped.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.MessageDroppedException.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.MessageDroppedException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a custom error message.
member.param: The custom error message.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.MessageDroppedException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a custom error message and an inner exception.
member.param: The custom error message.
The inner exception that caused this error.

member.name: T:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.NotAccessibleException
member.summary: Exception thrown when an attempt is made to access an unavailable value, such as a remote resource.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.NotAccessibleException.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.NotAccessibleException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a custom error message.
member.param: The custom error message.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.NotAccessibleException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a custom error message and an inner exception.
member.param: The custom error message.
The inner exception that caused this error.

member.name: T:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.UndeliverableException
member.summary: Exception thrown when a message cannot be delivered.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.UndeliverableException.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.UndeliverableException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a custom error message.
member.param: The custom error message.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.UndeliverableException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a custom error message and an inner exception.
member.param: The custom error message.
The inner exception that caused this error.

member.name: T:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.IAgent
member.summary: Represents an agent within the runtime that can process messages, maintain state, and be closed when no longer needed.

member.name: P:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.IAgent.Id
member.summary: Gets the unique identifier of the agent.

member.name: P:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.IAgent.Metadata
member.summary: Gets metadata associated with the agent.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.IAgent.OnMessageAsync(System.Object,Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.MessageContext)
member.summary: Handles an incoming message for the agent. This should only be called by the runtime, not by other agents.
member.param: The received message. The type should match one of the expected subscription types.
The context of the message, providing additional metadata.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation, returning a response to the message. The response can be null if no reply is necessary.
member.exception: Thrown if the message was cancelled.
Thrown if the agent cannot handle the message.

member.name: T:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.IAgentRuntime
member.summary: Defines the runtime environment for agents, managing message sending, subscriptions, agent resolution, and state persistence.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.IAgentRuntime.SendMessageAsync(System.Object,Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.AgentId,System.Nullable{Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.AgentId},System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a message to an agent and gets a response. This method should be used to communicate directly with an agent.
member.param: The message to send.
The agent to send the message to.
The agent sending the message. Should be null if sent from an external source.
A unique identifier for the message. If null, a new ID will be generated.
A token to cancel the operation if needed.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation, returning the response from the agent.
member.exception: Thrown if the recipient cannot handle the message.
Thrown if the message cannot be delivered.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.IAgentRuntime.PublishMessageAsync(System.Object,Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.TopicId,System.Nullable{Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.AgentId},System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Publishes a message to all agents subscribed to the given topic. No responses are expected from publishing.
member.param: The message to publish.
The topic to publish the message to.
The agent sending the message. Defaults to null.
A unique message ID. If null, a new one will be generated.
A token to cancel the operation if needed.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation.
member.exception: Thrown if the message cannot be delivered.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.IAgentRuntime.GetAgentAsync(Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.AgentId,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Retrieves an agent by its unique identifier.
member.param: The unique identifier of the agent.
If true, the agent is fetched lazily.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation, returning the agent's ID.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.IAgentRuntime.GetAgentAsync(Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.AgentType,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Retrieves an agent by its type.
member.param: The type of the agent.
An optional key to specify variations of the agent. Defaults to "default".
If true, the agent is fetched lazily.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation, returning the agent's ID.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.IAgentRuntime.GetAgentAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Retrieves an agent by its string representation.
member.param: The string representation of the agent.
An optional key to specify variations of the agent. Defaults to "default".
If true, the agent is fetched lazily.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation, returning the agent's ID.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.IAgentRuntime.SaveAgentStateAsync(Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.AgentId)
member.summary: Saves the state of an agent. The result must be JSON serializable.
member.param: The ID of the agent whose state is being saved.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation, returning a dictionary of the saved state.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.IAgentRuntime.LoadAgentStateAsync(Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.AgentId,System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary: Loads the saved state into an agent.
member.param: The ID of the agent whose state is being restored.
The state dictionary to restore.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.IAgentRuntime.GetAgentMetadataAsync(Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.AgentId)
member.summary: Retrieves metadata for an agent.
member.param: The ID of the agent.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation, returning the agent's metadata.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.IAgentRuntime.AddSubscriptionAsync(Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.ISubscriptionDefinition)
member.summary: Adds a new subscription for the runtime to handle when processing published messages.
member.param: The subscription to add.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.IAgentRuntime.RemoveSubscriptionAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Removes a subscription from the runtime.
member.param: The unique identifier of the subscription to remove.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation.
member.exception: Thrown if the subscription does not exist.

member.summary: Registers an agent factory with the runtime, associating it with a specific agent type. The type must be unique.
member.param: The agent type to associate with the factory.
A function that asynchronously creates the agent instance.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation, returning the registered .

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.IAgentRuntime.TryGetAgentProxyAsync(Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.AgentId)
member.summary: Attempts to retrieve an for the specified agent.
member.param: The ID of the agent.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation, returning an if successful.

member.name: T:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.IHostableAgent
member.summary: Represents an agent that can be explicitly hosted and closed when the runtime shuts down.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.IHostableAgent.CloseAsync
member.summary: Called when the runtime is closing.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation.

member.name: T:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.Internal.KeyValueParserExtensions
member.summary: Provides helper methods for parsing key-value string representations.

member.name: F:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.Internal.KeyValueParserExtensions.KVPairPattern
member.summary: The regular expression pattern used to match key-value pairs in the format "key/value".

member.name: F:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.Internal.KeyValueParserExtensions.KVPairRegex
member.summary: The compiled regex used for extracting key-value pairs from a string.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.Internal.KeyValueParserExtensions.ToKeyValuePair(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Parses a string in the format "key/value" into a tuple containing the key and value.
member.param: The input string containing a key-value pair.
The expected name of the key component.
The expected name of the value component.
member.returns: A tuple containing the extracted key and value.
member.exception: Thrown if the input string does not match the expected "key/value" format.

member.name: T:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.ISaveState
member.summary: Defines a contract for saving and loading the state of an object. The state must be JSON serializable.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.ISaveState.SaveStateAsync
member.summary: Saves the current state of the object.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation, returning a dictionary containing the saved state. The structure of the state is implementation-defined but must be JSON serializable.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.ISaveState.LoadStateAsync(System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary: Loads a previously saved state into the object.
member.param: A dictionary representing the saved state. The structure of the state is implementation-defined but must be JSON serializable.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation.

member.name: T:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.ISubscriptionDefinition
member.summary: Defines a subscription that matches topics and maps them to agents.

member.name: P:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.ISubscriptionDefinition.Id
member.summary: Gets the unique identifier of the subscription.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.ISubscriptionDefinition.Equals(System.Object)
member.summary: Determines whether the specified object is equal to the current subscription.
member.param: The object to compare with the current instance.
member.returns: true if the specified object is equal to this instance; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.ISubscriptionDefinition.Equals(Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.ISubscriptionDefinition)
member.summary: Determines whether the specified subscription is equal to the current subscription.
member.param: The subscription to compare.
member.returns: true if the subscriptions are equal; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.ISubscriptionDefinition.GetHashCode
member.summary: Returns a hash code for this subscription.
member.returns: A hash code for the subscription.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.ISubscriptionDefinition.Matches(Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.TopicId)
member.summary: Checks if a given matches the subscription.
member.param: The topic to check.
member.returns: true if the topic matches the subscription; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.ISubscriptionDefinition.MapToAgent(Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.TopicId)
member.summary: Maps a to an . Should only be called if returns true.
member.param: The topic to map.
member.returns: The that should handle the topic.

member.name: T:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.MessageContext
member.summary: Represents the context of a message being sent within the agent runtime. This includes metadata such as the sender, topic, RPC status, and cancellation handling.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.MessageContext.#ctor(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Represents the context of a message being sent within the agent runtime. This includes metadata such as the sender, topic, RPC status, and cancellation handling.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.MessageContext.#ctor(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.MessageContext.MessageId
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique identifier for this message.

member.name: P:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.MessageContext.CancellationToken
member.summary: Gets or sets the cancellation token associated with this message. This can be used to cancel the operation if necessary.

member.name: P:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.MessageContext.Sender
member.summary: Gets or sets the sender of the message. If null, the sender is unspecified.

member.name: P:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.MessageContext.Topic
member.summary: Gets or sets the topic associated with the message. If null, the message is not tied to a specific topic.

member.name: P:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.MessageContext.IsRpc
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether this message is part of an RPC (Remote Procedure Call).

member.name: T:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.TopicId
member.summary:
Represents a topic identifier that defines the scope of a broadcast message. The agent runtime implements a publish-subscribe model through its broadcast API, where messages must be published with a specific topic.
See the Python equivalent: CloudEvents Type Specification.

member.name: F:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.TopicId.DefaultSource
member.summary: The default source value used when no source is explicitly provided.

member.name: F:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.TopicId.Separator
member.summary: The separator character for the string representation of the topic.

member.name: P:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.TopicId.Type
member.summary:
Gets the type of the event that this represents. This adheres to the CloudEvents specification.
Must match the pattern: ^[\w\-\.\:\=]+$.
Learn more here: CloudEvents Type.

member.name: P:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.TopicId.Source
member.summary:
Gets the source that identifies the context in which an event happened. This adheres to the CloudEvents specification.
Learn more here: CloudEvents Source.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.TopicId.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct.
member.param: The type of the topic.
The source of the event. Defaults to if not specified.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.TopicId.#ctor(System.ValueTuple{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct from a tuple.
member.param: A tuple containing the topic type and source.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.TopicId.FromStr(System.String)
member.summary: Converts a string in the format "type/source" into a .
member.param: The topic ID string.
member.returns: An instance of .
member.exception: Thrown when the string is not in the valid "type/source" format.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.TopicId.ToString
member.summary: Returns the string representation of the .
member.returns: A string in the format "type/source".

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.TopicId.Equals(System.Object)
member.summary: Determines whether the specified object is equal to the current .
member.param: The object to compare with the current instance.
member.returns: true if the specified object is equal to the current ; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.TopicId.Equals(Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.TopicId)
member.summary: Determines whether the specified object is equal to the current .
member.param: The object to compare with the current instance.
member.returns: true if the specified object is equal to the current ; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.TopicId.GetHashCode
member.summary: Returns a hash code for this .
member.returns: A hash code for the current instance.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.TopicId.op_Explicit(System.String)~Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.TopicId
member.summary: Explicitly converts a string to a .
member.param: The string representation of a topic ID.
member.returns: An instance of .

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.TopicId.IsWildcardMatch(Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Agents.Runtime.TopicId)
member.summary: Determines whether the given matches another topic.
member.param: The topic ID to compare against.
member.returns: true if the topic types are equal; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.AppContextSwitchHelper
member.summary: Helper class to get app context switch value

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.AppContextSwitchHelper.GetConfigValue(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Returns the value of the specified app switch or environment variable if it is set. If the switch or environment variable is not set, return false. The app switch value takes precedence over the environment variable.
member.param: The name of the app switch.
The name of the environment variable.
member.returns: The value of the app switch or environment variable if it is set; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.IListExtensions.AddRange``1(System.Collections.Generic.IList{``0},System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0})
member.summary: Adds a range of elements from the specified source to the target .
member.typeparam: The type of elements in the list.
member.param: The target to add elements to.
The source containing elements to add to the target .

member.name: T:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.InternalTypeConverter
member.summary: Provides internal utility methods for converting types to strings with consideration for CultureInfo.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.InternalTypeConverter.ConvertToString(System.Object,System.Globalization.CultureInfo)
member.summary: Converts the given object value to a string representation using the appropriate CultureInfo.
member.param: The object to convert.
The CultureInfo to consider during conversion.
member.returns: A string representation of the object value, considering the specified CultureInfo.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.InternalTypeConverter.GetTypeToStringConverterDelegate(System.Type)
member.summary: Retrieves a type-to-string converter delegate for the specified source type.
member.param: The source Type for which to retrieve the type-to-string converter delegate.
member.returns: A Func delegate for converting the source type to a string, considering CultureInfo, or null if no suitable converter is found.

member.name: F:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.InternalTypeConverter.s_converters
member.summary: Converter functions for converting types to strings.

member.name: T:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.NonNullCollection`1
member.summary: Provides a collection of non-null items.

member.name: F:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.NonNullCollection`1._items
member.summary: The underlying list of items.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.NonNullCollection`1.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.NonNullCollection`1.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{`0})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The initial collection of items to populate this collection.

member.name: P:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.NonNullCollection`1.Item(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets or sets the item at the specified index in the collection.
member.param: The index of the item to get or set.
member.returns: The item at the specified index.
member.exception: The was not valid for this collection.

member.name: P:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.NonNullCollection`1.Count
member.summary: Gets the number of items in the collection.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.NonNullCollection`1.Add(`0)
member.summary: Adds an item to the collection.
member.param: The item to add.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.NonNullCollection`1.Clear
member.summary: Removes all items from the collection.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.NonNullCollection`1.Contains(`0)
member.summary: Determines whether an item is in the collection.
member.param: The item to locate.
member.returns: True if the item is found in the collection; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.NonNullCollection`1.CopyTo(`0[],System.Int32)
member.summary: Copies all of the items in the collection to an array, starting at the specified destination array index.
member.param: The destination array into which the items should be copied.
The zero-based index into at which copying should begin.
member.exception: The number of items in the collection is greater than the available space from to the end of .

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.NonNullCollection`1.IndexOf(`0)
member.summary: Searches for the specified item and returns the index of the first occurrence.
member.param: The item to locate.
member.returns: The index of the first found occurrence of the specified item; -1 if the item could not be found.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.NonNullCollection`1.Insert(System.Int32,`0)
member.summary: Inserts an item into the collection at the specified index.
member.param: The index at which the item should be inserted.
The item to insert.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.NonNullCollection`1.Remove(`0)
member.summary: Removes the first occurrence of the specified item from the collection.
member.param: The item to remove from the collection.
member.returns: True if the item was successfully removed; false if it wasn't located in the collection.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.NonNullCollection`1.RemoveAt(System.Int32)
member.summary: Removes the item at the specified index from the collection.
member.param: The index of the item to remove.

member.name: T:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.TypeConverterFactory
member.summary: Factory for creating TypeConverter instances based on a provided type.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.TypeConverterFactory.GetTypeConverter(System.Type)
member.summary: Returns a TypeConverter instance for the specified type.
member.param: The Type of the object to convert.
member.returns: A TypeConverter instance if a suitable converter is found, otherwise null.

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Verify.NotNull(System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Equivalent of ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull

member.name: M:Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Verify.ValidHostnameSegment(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Validates that a hostname segment string is safe for use as a URL segment, preventing URL injection.
member.param: The hostname segment string to validate (e.g., 'us-east1', 'europe-west4')
Optional parameter name for the exception
member.exception: Thrown when the location contains invalid characters or patterns

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.EmptyKeyedServiceProvider
member.summary: Provides an implementation of that contains no services.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.EmptyKeyedServiceProvider.Instance
member.summary: Gets a singleton instance of .

member.name: M:System.EnvExtensions.GetBoolEnvVar(System.String)
member.summary: Source: https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/sdk/core/Azure.Core/src/DiagnosticsOptions.cs Values: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/azure.core.diagnosticsoptions.istelemetryenabled?view=azure-dotnet

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.AllowNullAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that null is allowed as an input even if the corresponding type disallows it.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DisallowNullAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that null is disallowed as an input even if the corresponding type allows it.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MaybeNullAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that an output may be null even if the corresponding type disallows it.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that an output will not be null even if the corresponding type allows it.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MaybeNullWhenAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that when a method returns , the parameter may be null even if the corresponding type disallows it.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MaybeNullWhenAttribute.#ctor(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with the specified return value condition.
member.param: The return value condition. If the method returns this value, the associated parameter may be null.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MaybeNullWhenAttribute.ReturnValue
member.summary: Gets the return value condition.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullWhenAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that when a method returns , the parameter will not be null even if the corresponding type allows it.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullWhenAttribute.#ctor(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with the specified return value condition.
member.param: The return value condition. If the method returns this value, the associated parameter will not be null.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullWhenAttribute.ReturnValue
member.summary: Gets the return value condition.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullIfNotNullAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that the output will be non-null if the named parameter is non-null.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullIfNotNullAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with the associated parameter name.
member.param: The associated parameter name. The output will be non-null if the argument to the parameter specified is non-null.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullIfNotNullAttribute.ParameterName
member.summary: Gets the associated parameter name.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DoesNotReturnAttribute
member.summary: Applied to a method that will never return under any circumstance.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DoesNotReturnIfAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that the method will not return if the associated Boolean parameter is passed the specified value.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DoesNotReturnIfAttribute.#ctor(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with the specified parameter value.
member.param: The condition parameter value. Code after the method will be considered unreachable by diagnostics if the argument to the associated parameter matches this value.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DoesNotReturnIfAttribute.ParameterValue
member.summary: Gets the condition parameter value.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that the method or property will ensure that the listed field and property members have not-null values.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with a field or property member.
member.param: The field or property member that is promised to be not-null.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullAttribute.#ctor(System.String[])
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with the list of field and property members.
member.param: The list of field and property members that are promised to be not-null.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullAttribute.Members
member.summary: Gets field or property member names.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullWhenAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that the method or property will ensure that the listed field and property members have not-null values when returning with the specified return value condition.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullWhenAttribute.#ctor(System.Boolean,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with the specified return value condition and a field or property member.
member.param: The return value condition. If the method returns this value, the associated parameter will not be null.
The field or property member that is promised to be not-null.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullWhenAttribute.#ctor(System.Boolean,System.String[])
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with the specified return value condition and list of field and property members.
member.param: The return value condition. If the method returns this value, the associated parameter will not be null.
The list of field and property members that are promised to be not-null.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullWhenAttribute.ReturnValue
member.summary: Gets the return value condition.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullWhenAttribute.Members
member.summary: Gets field or property member names.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.UnconditionalSuppressMessageAttribute
member.summary: Polyfill for the UnconditionalSuppressMessageAttribute introduced in .NET 8.0 Suppresses reporting of a specific rule violation, allowing multiple suppressions on a single code artifact.
member.remarks: is different than in that it doesn't have a . So it is always preserved in the compiled assembly.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.UnconditionalSuppressMessageAttribute.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class, specifying the category of the tool and the identifier for an analysis rule.
member.param: The category for the attribute.
The identifier of the analysis rule the attribute applies to.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.UnconditionalSuppressMessageAttribute.Category
member.summary: Gets the category identifying the classification of the attribute.
member.remarks: The property describes the tool or tool analysis category for which a message suppression attribute applies.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.UnconditionalSuppressMessageAttribute.CheckId
member.summary: Gets the identifier of the analysis tool rule to be suppressed.
member.remarks: Concatenated together, the and properties form a unique check identifier.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.UnconditionalSuppressMessageAttribute.Scope
member.summary: Gets or sets the scope of the code that is relevant for the attribute.
member.remarks: The Scope property is an optional argument that specifies the metadata scope for which the attribute is relevant.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.UnconditionalSuppressMessageAttribute.Target
member.summary: Gets or sets a fully qualified path that represents the target of the attribute.
member.remarks: The property is an optional argument identifying the analysis target of the attribute. An example value is "System.IO.Stream.ctor():System.Void". Because it is fully qualified, it can be long, particularly for targets such as parameters. The analysis tool user interface should be capable of automatically formatting the parameter.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.UnconditionalSuppressMessageAttribute.MessageId
member.summary: Gets or sets an optional argument expanding on exclusion criteria.
member.remarks: The property is an optional argument that specifies additional exclusion where the literal metadata target is not sufficiently precise. For example, the cannot be applied within a method, and it may be desirable to suppress a violation against a statement in the method that will give a rule violation, but not against all statements in the method.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.UnconditionalSuppressMessageAttribute.Justification
member.summary: Gets or sets the justification for suppressing the code analysis message.

member.name: T:System.Runtime.CompilerServices.IsExternalInit
member.summary: Reserved to be used by the compiler for tracking metadata. This class should not be used by developers in source code.

member.name: T:System.Runtime.CompilerServices.RequiredMemberAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that a type has required members or that a member is required.

member.name: P:System.Runtime.CompilerServices.CompilerFeatureRequiredAttribute.FeatureName
member.summary: The name of the compiler feature.

member.name: P:System.Runtime.CompilerServices.CompilerFeatureRequiredAttribute.IsOptional
member.summary: If true, the compiler can choose to allow access to the location where this attribute is applied if it does not understand .

member.name: F:System.Runtime.CompilerServices.CompilerFeatureRequiredAttribute.RefStructs
member.summary: The used for the ref structs C# feature.

member.name: F:System.Runtime.CompilerServices.CompilerFeatureRequiredAttribute.RequiredMembers
member.summary: The used for the required members C# feature.

member.name: T:System.ExceptionExtensions
member.summary: Exception extension methods.

member.name: M:System.ExceptionExtensions.IsCriticalException(System.Exception)
member.summary: Check if an exception is of a type that should not be caught by the kernel.
member.param: Exception.
member.returns: True if is a critical exception and should not be caught.

member.name: T:ValueTaskExtensions
member.summary: Convenience extensions for ValueTask patterns within .netstandard2.0 projects.

member.name: M:ValueTaskExtensions.AsValueTask``1(``0)
member.summary: Creates a that's completed successfully with the specified result.

member.name: M:ValueTaskExtensions.AsValueTask``1(System.Exception)
member.summary: Creates a that's failed and is associated with an exception.

member.name: M:ValueTaskExtensions.AsValueTask(System.Threading.Tasks.Task)
member.summary: Present a regular task as a ValueTask.
